div1.entryFree: Potency, power: I would to heaven I had your p. Meas. II, 2, 67. read the cardinal's malice and his p. together, H8 I, 1, 105. when we will tempt the frailty of our powers, presuming on their changeful p. Troil. IV, 4, 99. arriving at place of p. and sway o' the state, Cor. II, 3, 190. or throw him (the devil) out with wondrous p. Hml. III, 4, 170. our p. made good, take thy reward, Lr. I, 1, 175.
